_meta.note: TON research conducted independently with H8 curl evidence. 4/7 endpoints verified E2 200 OK. param_formats may need normalization in S1 alignment with TONAdapter.

public_endpoints.notes: toncenter v2 JSON-RPC, HTTP:200 getMasterchainInfo, ratelimit 1 RPS without key
toncenter v2 REST (same backend as jsonRPC), HTTP:200 across 8 methods
toncenter v3 REST indexer, HTTP:200 masterchainInfo and transactions; envelope-less
Tonhub v4 API, HTTP:200 /block/latest, camelCase schema, independent of toncenter

notes: TON独立family,需新建TONAdapter。toncenter v2同时提供REST和JSON-RPC双协议;响应envelope非标准({ok,result,@extra}包装)。地址三态:raw(0:hex64)/friendly bounceable(EQ...)/non-bounceable(UQ...),adapter必须normalize到raw去重。tx_id是(account,lt,hash)三元组,非单hash。native decimals=9 nanoton。公链限流1RPS无key,性能基准必须self-host ton-http-api。
